subject: RE: FW: FW: Introduction: Ayrton Mansi | Broadbeach Development Project
snippet: Hi Ayrton If you have a few minutes now, let me know and I'll call you. Otherwise, I have good availability Monday before 12pm Yours faithfully Jon‑Paul Selfe Special Counsel T +61 7 5553 9584 M +
